title: Prompt Engineering Fundamentals
description: Learn the science and art of communicating with Large Language Models. This course covers structured prompt design, few-shot learning, chain-of-thought reasoning, and avoiding AI bias, turning you into a highly effective prompt engineer.

seo_metadata.title: Prompt Engineering Fundamentals Certificate | ProCerix
seo_metadata.description: Master the art of Prompt Engineering. Learn zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought prompting techniques.

learning_outcomes: Understand the core architecture and limitations of LLMs
Apply Zero-Shot, One-Shot, and Few-Shot prompting techniques
Implement Chain-of-Thought reasoning to solve complex problems
Design robust system prompts for AI applications
Identify and mitigate biases and hallucinations in AI outputs

modules.title: The Anatomy of a Prompt
modules.description: Breaking down the elements of effective communication with AI.

lessons.title: Core Components
lessons.content:
Instruction, Context, Input, Output

A professional prompt contains up to four elements: A clear instruction, background context, the input data to process, and the desired output format (e.g., JSON, markdown, table).

lessons.title: Zero-Shot vs. Few-Shot
lessons.content:
Providing Examples

Zero-shot prompting asks the AI to perform a task without any examples. Few-shot prompting provides 2-5 examples of the input-output mapping, which significantly increases the reliability of the model.

modules.title: Advanced Reasoning Techniques
modules.description: Getting the AI to think before it speaks.

lessons.title: Chain-of-Thought (CoT)
lessons.content:
Step-by-Step Logic

By simply adding 'Let's think step by step' to your prompt, you force the AI to output its reasoning process before giving the final answer. This drastically reduces mathematical and logical errors.

lessons.title: Tree of Thoughts
lessons.content:
Exploring Multiple Paths

An advanced technique where you ask the AI to generate multiple possible solutions to a problem, evaluate them against each other, and select the optimal path.

modules.title: Safety and System Prompts
modules.description: Building robust and safe AI interactions.

lessons.title: Writing System Prompts
lessons.content:
Defining the AI's Identity

In API development, the System Prompt dictates the overarching behavior of the model. It sets rules that user prompts cannot easily override, essential for building secure chatbots.

lessons.title: Mitigating Hallucinations
lessons.content:
Grounding the Model

To prevent hallucinations, provide the AI with a reference text and instruct it: 'Answer the question using ONLY the provided text. If the answer is not in the text, say "I don't know."'

mcqs.question: What are the four core components of a highly structured prompt?

options.content: Question, Answer, Source, Date
Instruction, Context, Input Data, Output Indicator
Title, Body, Signature, Attachment
Who, What, Where, When
Asking a question without providing any examples of the desired output
Using zero words in your prompt
Prompting an AI that has zero training data
Getting a completely incorrect answer
It makes the prompt shorter
It confuses the AI, making it work harder
It shows the AI the pattern and format you expect, improving reliability
It bypasses the AI's safety filters

mcqs.question: What is the primary benefit of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting?

options.content: It makes the output rhyme
It forces the AI to output its reasoning process, reducing logical errors
It makes the generation process instantaneous
It generates code in multiple languages simultaneously

mcqs.question: Which phrase is commonly added to a prompt to trigger basic Chain-of-Thought reasoning?

options.content: Hurry up
Write this as a poem
Let's think step by step
Ignore all previous instructions

mcqs.question: In the context of AI APIs (like OpenAI's), what is the role of the System Prompt?

options.content: To reboot the server
To dictate the overarching identity, rules, and boundaries of the AI
To collect user analytics
To process payment information

mcqs.question: What is one of the most effective ways to prevent an AI from hallucinating facts?

options.content: Provide reference text and instruct it to answer using ONLY that text
Tell it to use its imagination
Ask it yes or no questions only
Threaten it with a low rating

mcqs.question: What is the 'Output Indicator' in a prompt?

options.content: The flashing cursor on the screen
The final part of the prompt that specifies the format (e.g., 'Format as JSON:')
The loading spinner
The length of the response

mcqs.question: What does the 'Tree of Thoughts' prompting technique involve?

options.content: Drawing a family tree using ASCII art
Asking the AI to generate, evaluate, and select from multiple possible reasoning paths
Only asking questions about nature
Saving prompts in a hierarchical folder structure

mcqs.question: Why might a prompt engineer assign a 'Persona' (e.g., 'Act as a senior copywriter') to the AI?

options.content: To unlock restricted features
To guide the vocabulary, tone, and depth of the generated response
To make the AI self-aware
Because the AI requires a name to function
